description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent red-tiled hip roof and white exterior walls. The facade includes a mix of large and small rectangular windows, some with greenish-tinted glass and others with black or white framing. There is a covered balcony or porch area on one side, and a partially enclosed ground-level space that could serve as a garage or patio. The house sits on a raised foundation with angular, modern lines and a combination of open and enclosed spaces. The overall design is clean and geometric, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functional, urban living.
description: A modern two-story house with a red-tiled hip roof, white walls, and a mix of large and small windows, featuring a covered balcony and angular foundation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with a large black-framed window, a covered balcony on the left, and a prominent red-tiled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the extended rooflines, and the partially enclosed ground-level area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a black entryway, and a spacious patio or terrace area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear view of the extended roof overhang, large green-tinted window, and angular wall sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is recessed with a simple black door, no visible steps, and a covered porch area on one side.
